main_stage.action_interpret: A person  wants to register as a tutor  user in the system.
main_stage.action_original: A person *(person &-id=int) wants to register as a tutor *(tutor &-id=int [+userRegistration=Tutor]) user in the system. *ˇ(tutor)<>*(Person)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: The person accesses the User Registration  interface.
main_stage.action_original: The person accesses the User Registration *(@User Registration) interface. *ˇ(person)<<*(User Registration)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Shows you the fields to fill in the interface : *|Status »Disabled »Enabled| *|UserType »Tutor »Patient »Admin| first name,last name,date of birth,gender,phone number,email username,password. *|Status| In addition, the system assigns , an id when storing it. -*|UserType|
main_stage.action_original:
Shows you the fields to fill in the interface *(@User registration): 
*|Status »Disabled »Enabled| *|UserType »Tutor »Patient »Admin| *(Person &-/first name/=String, &-/last name/=String, &-/date of birth/=Date, &-/gender/=String, &-/phone number/=String, &-/email/=String) *!(User &-id=Int, &-/username/=String, &-/password/=String &-status=Status &-user type=UserType). *ˇ(person)->*|Status|ˇ In addition, the system assigns , an id when storing it. *ˇ(person)->*|UserType|ˇ *ˇ(person)><*(User)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: The person enters all the data required by the view, and clicks submit.
main_stage.action_original: The person enters all the data required by the view, and clicks submit.

main_stage.action_interpret: Create a person  object
main_stage.action_original: Create a person *(person %.first name=String, .last name=String, .date of birth=Date, .gender=String, .phone number=String, .email=String%) object

main_stage.action_interpret: Create a tutor  object
main_stage.action_original: Create a tutor *(tutor %.person=Person%) object

main_stage.action_interpret: Create an user  object
main_stage.action_original: Create an user *(user %.username=String, .password=String, .status=Status, .user type=UserType, .person=Tutor%) object

main_stage.action_interpret: Saves the tutor data in the database.
main_stage.action_original: *(TutorDAO &id=Int [/Save/=Tutor{.tutor=Tutor}])s the tutor data in the database. *ˇ(TutorDAO)<<*(tutor)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Saves the user data in the database.
main_stage.action_original: *(UserDAO &-id=Int [/Save/=User{.user=User}])s the user data in the database. *ˇ(UserDAO)<<*(User)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: This use case ends when the system displays the  login Interface.
main_stage.action_original: This use case ends when the system displays the *(@Login) login Interface. *ˇ(Login)<<*(UserDAO)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: This use case starts when A tutor   wants to register to a  user in the system.
main_stage.action_original: A tutor *(Patient &-id=int) *(tutor [+patient registration = Patient]) wants to register to a ˇ*(patient)<>*(person)ˇ user in the system.

main_stage.action_interpret: The tutor accesses the  interface.
main_stage.action_original: The tutor accesses the *(@Patient User Registration) interface. *ˇ(Patient User Registration)<<*(tutor)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Shows you the fields to fill in the interface User registration : nivel de discapacidad,enabled as a user.
main_stage.action_original: Shows you the fields to fill in the interface User registration : *(Patient &-/nivel de discapacidad/=Discapacidad, &-/enabled as a user/=Status).

main_stage.action_interpret: The person enters all the data required by the view, and clicks submit.
main_stage.action_original: The person enters all the data required by the view, and clicks submit.

main_stage.action_interpret: Create a person
main_stage.action_original: Create a person *(person %.first name=String  .last name=String, .date of birth=Date, .gender=String, .phone number=String, .email=String%)

main_stage.action_interpret: Create a patient *|levelDisability»gradeOne»gradeTwo»gradeThree|  *|Status| -*|levelDisability|
main_stage.action_original: Create a patient *|levelDisability»gradeOne»gradeTwo»gradeThree| *(Patient %.person=Person, .level of disability=levelDisability, .enabled as a user=Status%) *ˇ(Patient)->*|Status|ˇ *ˇ(Patient)->*|levelDisability|ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: saves the patient data in the database.
main_stage.action_original: *(PatientDAO[ &-id=Int +/save/=Pacient{.patient=Patient}])s the patient data in the database. *ˇ(PatientDAO)<<*(Patient)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: This use case ends when the system displays the Interface for Patient Registration .
main_stage.action_original: This use case ends when the system displays the Interface for Patient Registration *(@Patient Registration). *ˇ(PatientDAO)<<*(Patient Registration)ˇ

useCase.name: Device registration
useCase.porpuse: The MAC address belongs to another Device.

main_stage.action_interpret: This use case starts when The tutor wants to register a Ńawi device &-id=Int , and accesses the @Registration Device interface.
main_stage.action_original: The (tutor) wants to register a Ńawi (device &-id=Int [+deviceregistration=Device]), and accesses the (@Registration Device) interface. *ˇ(device)<<*(Registration Device)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Displays the @Registration Device interface for entering the device data as name,MAC address *|Status|
main_stage.action_original: Displays the (@Registration Device) interface for entering the device data as *(Device &-/name/=String, &-/MAC address/=String, &-state=State, &-patient=NULL) *ˇ(Device)->*|Status|ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Enter the device data such as name and MAC address.
main_stage.action_original: Enter the device data such as name and MAC address.

main_stage.action_interpret: Tutor clicks on the register device button.
main_stage.action_original: Tutor clicks on the *(DeviceDAO &-id=int [+/register device/=Int{.device=Device}]) button.

main_stage.action_interpret: Creates a device  object to be stored
main_stage.action_original: Creates a device *(device %.name=String, .MACAddress=String, .state=State, .patient=Patient%) object to be stored

main_stage.action_interpret: The device data is stored in the database.
main_stage.action_original: The *(DeviceDAO[ &-id=int +save=Device{./device/=Device}]) data is stored in the database. *ˇ(DeviceDAO)<<*(device)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: The tutor  wants to assign a device to a patient, and accesses the  interface.
main_stage.action_original: The (tutor) *!(DeviceToPatient &-id=int) wants to assign a *(Tutor [+/device to a patient/=DeviceToPatient{.patient=Patient, .device=Device, .date=Date}]), and accesses the *(@DeviceToPatientAssignment) interface. *ˇ(Tutor)<<*(device to patient assignment)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Displays the  assignment interface.
main_stage.action_original: Displays the *(@DeviceToPatientAssignment) assignment interface.

main_stage.action_interpret: patienteQuerys the patients of tutor who have not been assigned a device.
main_stage.action_original: *(PatientDAO[+/patienteQuery/=List{.tutor=Tutor, .status=Status}])s the patients of tutor who have not been assigned a device.

main_stage.action_interpret: Select patient
main_stage.action_original: Select patient

main_stage.action_interpret: Select the device
main_stage.action_original: Select the device

main_stage.action_interpret: Click on the assign button
main_stage.action_original: Click on the assign button

main_stage.action_interpret: Create a Device to patient  object to be stored
main_stage.action_original: Create a Device to patient *(DeviceToPatient %.device=Device, .patient=Patient, .date=Date%) object to be stored

main_stage.action_interpret: Save,device to pacients object in the database.
main_stage.action_original: *(DeviceToPacientDAO[+/Save/=DeviceToPatient{./device to pacient/=DeviceToPatient}])s object in the database. *ˇ(DeviceToPatient)><*(Device)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Set device of patient .
main_stage.action_original: Set device of patient *(Patient[+setDevice=Empty{.device=Device]). *ˇ(DeviceToPacientDAO)<<*(DeviceToPatient)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: This use case ends when stores the patient data in the database.
main_stage.action_original: This use case ends when stores the *(PatientDAO[+save=Pacient{./patient/=Patient}]) data in the database.

useCase.name: Obstacle Recognition
useCase.porpuse: The distance is more than 5m or less than 0.5m

main_stage.action_interpret: This use case starts when The patient is using the device .
main_stage.action_original: The patient is using the device *(Device[+obtacle Recognition=String{.photo=String}).

main_stage.action_interpret: The ultrasonic sensors send the data to the systems.
main_stage.action_original: The ultrasonic sensors send the data to the systems.

main_stage.action_interpret: Calculate distance.
main_stage.action_original: *(Device [+/Calculate distance/=Double]).

main_stage.action_interpret: Checks that the distance is less than 5m
main_stage.action_original: Checks that the distance is less than 5m

main_stage.action_interpret: Takes photo.
main_stage.action_original: *(Device[+/Takes photo/=Photo]).

main_stage.action_interpret: On the basis of the photograph process image identifies the object.
main_stage.action_original: On the basis of the photograph *!(Recognition[+/process image/=String]) identifies the object. *ˇ(Device)><*(Recognition)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Takes the location data, longitude,altitude,site, as part of the data for the  eventobject name,distance
main_stage.action_original: Takes the location data, *(Location &-/longitude/=String, &-/altitude/=String, &-/site/=String), as part of the data for the  event*!(event &-location=Location, &-/object name/=String, &-/distance/=Double)

main_stage.action_interpret: Create a  location  object.
main_stage.action_original: Create a  location *(Location %.longitude=String, .latitude=String, .site=String%) object. *ˇ(Event)><*(Location)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Create a event  object.
main_stage.action_original: Create a event *(Event %.location=Location, .date=Date, .distance=Distance%) object. *ˇ(Device)><*(Event)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: The event  is stored in the database.
main_stage.action_original: The event *(EventDAO &-id=int [+Save=Event{.event=Event}]) is stored in the database. *ˇ(EventDAO)<<*(Event)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Wait 2 seconds and return to step 2
main_stage.action_original: Wait 2 seconds and return to step 2

main_stage.action_interpret: This use case starts when The tutor wants to consult events generated during the travel time of patient, and accessed to  Interface.
main_stage.action_original: The tutor wants to *(Tutor [+/consult events/=Event{.initialDate=Date, .finalDate=Date}]) generated during the travel time of patient, and accessed to *(@consult events) Interface. *ˇ(Tutor)<<*(consult events)ˇ

main_stage.action_interpret: Displays the interface for querying events, and  enable to select the date range, start date, and end date.
main_stage.action_original: Displays the interface for querying events, and  enable to select the date range, start date, and end date.

main_stage.action_interpret: Select starting date
main_stage.action_original: Select starting date

main_stage.action_interpret: Select end date
main_stage.action_original: Select end date

main_stage.action_interpret: Validate date range,start date is less than or equal to the end date.
main_stage.action_original: *(EventDAO [+/Validate date range/{./start date/=Date .end date=Date}]) is less than or equal to the end date.

main_stage.action_interpret: Gets the events report,from,start date,to,end date.
main_stage.action_original: Gets the *(EventDAO [+/events report/=List{ /from/ ./start date/=Date, /to/ ./end date/=Date}]).

main_stage.action_interpret: This use case starts when This use case starts when sending the new event to the devices connected to the service.
main_stage.action_original: This use case starts when sending the new event to the devices connected to the service.

main_stage.action_interpret: This use case ends when the notification is sent to mobile application.
main_stage.action_original: This use case ends when the notification is sent to mobile application.
